app.name: Cougny
app.tagline: Meet someone new, face to face.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.acceptanceBody: By using Cougny you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
terms.eligibilityBody: You must be at least 18 years old to use Cougny. By starting a call you confirm that you meet this requirement.
terms.conductBody: Nudity, sexual content, harassment, hate speech, spam, and any illegal activity are strictly prohibited. Violations can lead to an immediate and permanent ban.
terms.privacyBody: Video, audio, and chat messages travel directly between you and your partner over an encrypted peer-to-peer connection. Cougny does not record, store, or monitor the content of your calls.
terms.moderationBody: You can report a partner at any time. Reports are reviewed by our team and may result in restrictions or bans for the reported user.
terms.liabilityBody: Cougny is provided as-is, without warranties of any kind. You are solely responsible for your interactions with other users.
terms.changesBody: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after an update constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

call.searching: Looking for someone to talk to…
call.idleHint: Press Start to meet someone new.
call.permissionDenied: Camera and microphone access is required to start a call.
call.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

report.title: Report this person
report.thanks: Thanks — our team will review this.
report.error: Couldn't submit your report. Please try again.
